raw_consumer_statement: In XX/XX/year> I purchased an app titled XXXX through XXXX XXXX at {$85.00} with a stipulation I could cancel within XX/XX/XXXXdays. I canceled on the XXXX day. XXXX XXXX issued a refund to my credit card. I still have not rec 'd this. I paid the balance of XXXX because I didn't want to affect my credit. I have called the bank numerous times since XXXX. At first they told me I would get the refund within XX/XX/XXXX days. Now they so I'm not entitled to it. The rep told me that XXXX XXXX had refunded it XX/XX/XXXX so I didn't get a refund. I told her that I had paid it. I'm sure this is confusing. If you have any questions please call me. The back said you can only get a refund within XX/XX/XXXX months. XX/XX/XXXX will beXX/XX/XXXXmonths according to them. Thank you
